svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="hpetC8ltaVK3FmKoRE67" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-529" dy="-217" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Agent Orchestration Patterns" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="800" x="100" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=4;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="930" x="40" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a5c1a;" value="Pattern 1: Sequential Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="320" x="54" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1-in" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Input" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="90" x="60" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1-a1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Agent 1
(Researcher)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="194" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1-a2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Agent 2
(Drafter)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="366" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1-a3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Agent 3
(Critic)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="538" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1-a4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Agent 4
(Finalizer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="710" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1-out" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Output" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="78" x="874" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p1-ia1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1-in" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1-a1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p1-a1a2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1-a1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1-a2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p1-a2a3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1-a2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1-a3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p1-a3a4" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1-a3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1-a4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p1-a4o" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1-a4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p1-out" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=4;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="930" x="40" y="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a4e79;" value="Pattern 2: Coordinator (Hub-and-Spoke)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="380" x="54" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-coord" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#60a917;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2D7600;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Orchestrator
(Coordinator Agent)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="170" x="390" y="222" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Specialist
Agent A" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="60" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Specialist
Agent B" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="226" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Specialist
Agent C" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="604" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Specialist
Agent D" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="770" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p2-cs1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2-coord" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;exitX=0;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p2-s1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p2-cs2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2-coord" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;exitX=0;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p2-s2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p2-cs3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2-coord" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p2-s3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p2-cs4" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2-coord" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p2-s4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="Each specialist reports back to the coordinator, which synthesizes results into a final response." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="840" x="60" y="352" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=4;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="172" width="930" x="40" y="428" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7a5c00;" value="Pattern 3: Initializer-Executor Split (Long-Running)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="460" x="54" y="432" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3-init" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Initializer Agent
(runs ONCE)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="70" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3-state" parent="1" style="cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Shared State
(disk / VCS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="120" x="395" y="458" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3-exec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Executor Agent
(runs N times)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="700" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p3-write" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3-init" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p3-state" value="Write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p3-read" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3-state" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p3-exec" value="Read"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p3-update" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3-exec" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p3-state" value="Update"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="780" y="562" /> <mxPoint x="455" y="562" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=4;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="168" width="930" x="40" y="616" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#8a0000;" value="Pattern 4: Generator-Evaluator (GAN-Inspired)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="460" x="54" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4-in" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Task / Prompt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="110" x="60" y="656" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4-gen" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Generator Agent
(creates output)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="230" y="656" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4-eval" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Evaluator Agent
(skeptical judge)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="570" y="656" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4-out" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Approved
Output" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="110" x="810" y="656" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p4-ig" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4-in" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p4-gen" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p4-ge" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4-gen" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="p4-eval" value="Draft"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p4-approve" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4-eval" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p4-out" value="Approve"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-p4-revise" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4-eval" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p4-gen" value="Revise"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="645" y="750" /> <mxPoint x="305" y="750" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
